---
name: Detection Rule Submission
about: Submit a new or updated Sigma detection rule
title: '[RULE] T[technique]: <rule title>'
labels: rule-submission
---

## Rule Summary

**Parent Hypothesis**: DH-XXX
**ATT&CK Technique**: T[technique]
**Platform**: Windows / Linux / Network
**Detection Platform**: Elastic / CrowdStrike / Both

## Lab Validation

### Check 1: True Positive
- [ ] Atomic test ran
- [ ] Rule fired in lab SIEM
- [ ] Screenshot attached

### Check 2: False Positive
- [ ] Normal admin activity tested
- [ ] Rule did NOT fire

### Check 3: Rebuild and Retest
- [ ] VM restored from clean baseline
- [ ] Rule fired consistently on second run

## Variants Tested

| Tool/Method | Result |
|-------------|--------|
| Variant 1 | Detected / Not detected |

## Coverage Score

- Elastic: 0 / 1 / 2 / 3
- CrowdStrike: 0 / 1 / 2 / 3
